parameters.content:
## Extract Product Data from Website

E-commerce teams use this recipe to normalize public product pages into catalog records. Pull product names, prices, availability, and specifications without writing selectors for every storefront.

**Note:** This workflow uses the Iteration Layer community node (`n8n-nodes-iterationlayer`). Install it via Settings > Community Nodes before importing. Self-hosted n8n only.

### Step 1: Extract Website Data
Resource: **Website Extraction**

Configure the public website URL and schema below, then connect your credentials.

parameters.schemaJson: {"fields":[{"name":"product_name","type":"TEXT","description":"Product name shown on the page"},{"name":"price","type":"CURRENCY_AMOUNT","description":"Current product price"},{"name":"availability","type":"TEXT","description":"Stock or availability status"},{"name":"description","type":"TEXTAREA","description":"Product description"},{"name":"specifications","type":"ARRAY","description":"Product specification rows","fields":[{"name":"specification","type":"TEXT","description":"One product specification"}]}]}
